data.title: Amerant Bancorp Names Adrian Rodriguez Permanent COO
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Amerant Bancorp ( (AMTB) ) has issued an update.

On May 26, 2026, Amerant Bancorp Inc. and Amerant Bank, N.A. appointed Adrian Rodriguez as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, formalizing a role he had held on an interim basis since November 10, 2025, following leadership changes that elevated former COO Carlos Iafigliola to President and Chief Executive Officer on May 18, 2026. Rodriguez brings more than 13 years of banking management experience and a background in internal controls and loan operations, having overseen SOX compliance, vendor risk, key strategic projects such as the bank’s 2023 core platform transition and 2024 Houston franchise sale, and the company’s 2018 IPO, while his compensation terms for the permanent COO post remain to be finalized and disclosed, though his current pay continues under existing arrangements.

The most recent analyst rating on (AMTB) stock is a Buy with a $26.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Amerant Bancorp stock, see the AMTB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AMTB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AMTB is a Neutral.

AMTB scores 62 primarily due to improved profitability and solid current cash generation, tempered by TTM revenue decline and historical volatility. Valuation is supportive (low P/E), while technical signals are slightly weak (negative MACD, sub-50 RSI). Earnings call guidance was generally constructive on growth, costs, and capital returns, but credit and margin headwinds remain meaningful.

To see Spark’s full report on AMTB stock, click here.

More about Amerant Bancorp

Amerant Bancorp Inc., through its subsidiary Amerant Bank, N.A., operates as a U.S. regional banking institution providing commercial and consumer banking services. The company focuses on lending, deposit products and related financial services, supported by loan operations, credit management and regulatory compliance functions that are central to its business model and growth strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 259,884

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $888.6M

Find detailed analytics on AMTB stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

ProKidney ( (PROK) ) has issued an update.

On May 28, 2026, ProKidney Corp. held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, at which shareholders elected three directors, William F. Doyle, Alan M. Lotvin, M.D., and Brian J.G. Pereira, to three-year terms ending at the 2029 annual meeting. At the same meeting, stockholders also ratified the appointment of Ernst & Young LLP as ProKidney’s independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026, underscoring continuity in both the company’s governance and audit oversight.

These voting outcomes reinforce stability in ProKidney’s leadership and financial reporting framework, which can provide greater predictability for investors and other stakeholders. The reconstituted board and confirmed external auditor together signal incremental continuity rather than a strategic shift, suggesting the company will maintain its existing corporate direction and compliance practices in the near term.

The most recent analyst rating on (PROK) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ProKidney stock, see the PROK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PROK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PROK is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (minimal revenue, large losses, and heavy cash burn), reinforced by a technically weak downtrend (trading below all major moving averages with negative MACD). Offsetting factors are limited but include constructive corporate progress on the pivotal Phase 3 program and stated cash runway into mid-2027, while valuation support is minimal given the deeply negative P/E and no dividend.

data.title: Upay Delays Annual Filing Amid Auditor Review
data.description:
Upay ( (UPYY) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Upay, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors of a delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial period ended February 28, 2026, along with a related Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) that remains under review. The company emphasizes that the delayed filing concerns completion of financial reporting for the most recent fiscal year.

The primary reason for the delay is that Upay’s independent auditor has not yet finished reviewing the company’s financial statements and the Form 10-Q (Quarter Report). Management states that filing on time would have required unreasonable effort and expense while this audit work is still in progress.

Upay indicates that it expects to file the missing Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the 15-day extension window allowed under SEC rules for such notifications. The company also notes that quarterly reports such as the Form 10-Q (Quarter Report), when delayed, are generally required to be filed within five days of the original deadline.

On the financial side, Upay does not anticipate a significant change in overall results of operations compared with the same period last year, although it does flag one notable shift. The company expects its financial statements to show an $86,835 decline in revenue, from $257,249 for the three months ended May 31, 2024 to $170,414 for the three months ended May 31, 2025, driven mainly by weaker transactional revenue in its South African operations.

These revenue figures are preliminary and reflect management’s current expectations, meaning actual reported results may differ once the audit review is completed and the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) and related Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) are filed. Investors should treat this information as forward-looking and subject to change as final numbers are prepared.

Upay affirms that all other required periodic SEC reports over the past 12 months have been filed, underlining its intention to remain in compliance despite the current delay. The notification is signed on behalf of the company by Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer Jaco Folscher, dated May 29, 2026, signaling executive-level oversight of the late-filing process.

More about Upay

Average Trading Volume: 1,000

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $15.75M

For an in-depth examination of UPYY stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

The latest update is out from Otello Corporation ASA ( (GB:0FI5) ).

Otello Corporation ASA is a Norway-based technology company that develops and licenses software and digital services, with a focus on internet and mobile platforms. The company uses share repurchase programs as an active capital management tool to adjust its treasury share position and optimize its balance sheet.

Otello reported that Pareto Securities bought 70,100 shares on its behalf between 26 and 29 May 2026 at an average price of NOK 18.26, bringing total purchases in the ongoing buyback program to 1,468,936 shares. The program allows purchases of up to 3,689,541 shares at a maximum price of NOK 20, and Otello now holds 5,158,477 treasury shares under an authorization from the September 2025 extraordinary general meeting.

More about Otello Corporation ASA

data.title: Exxon Mobil Shareholders Back Board, Approve Texas Redomiciling
data.description:
Memorial Day Sale – Claim 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
  • Discover high-conviction stock picks and new investing opportunities with the TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter

Exxon Mobil ( (XOM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Exxon Mobil held its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on May 27, 2026, with 87.8% of eligible shares represented, and shareholders elected all 12 board-nominated directors with strong majorities, generally above 96% of votes cast. Investors also overwhelmingly ratified the company’s independent auditors and approved executive compensation, signaling continued confidence in current leadership and governance practices.

Shareholders approved the company’s proposal to redomicile from New Jersey to Texas with 71.2% support, a move that could have long-term implications for its corporate governance and regulatory environment. Investor attempts to secure an independent board chair and to alter Exxon Mobil’s voluntary retail voting program were decisively rejected, underscoring broad backing for the existing board structure and management-aligned voting framework.

The most recent analyst rating on (XOM) stock is a Hold with a $175.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Exxon Mobil stock, see the XOM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on XOM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, XOM is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid fundamentals anchored by a conservative balance sheet and still-healthy profitability, tempered by weaker free-cash-flow conversion versus prior years. Technicals are mixed with subdued momentum, and valuation is a headwind given the elevated P/E despite a moderate dividend yield. Earnings-call execution progress supports the outlook, but notable geopolitical/LNG repair and chemicals margin risks cap the score.

To see Spark’s full report on XOM stock, click here.

More about Exxon Mobil

Exxon Mobil Corporation is a global integrated oil and gas company engaged in the exploration, production, refining and marketing of petroleum and petrochemical products. The company operates across the energy value chain and is one of the largest publicly traded energy providers, supplying fuels, lubricants and chemical products to industrial, commercial and consumer markets worldwide.
